description: Implement remaining INTENT.md features: frontend category sync, why-it-matters generation, Telegram format, archive search, and deployment

userStories.title: Add LLM-powered why-it-matters to keyword-only fallback
userStories.description: As a reader, I want meaningful why it matters text even when DeepSeek API is unavailable so the weekly digest is useful without LLM.
acceptanceCriteria: Generate meaningful why it matters text from article title, category, and region in keyword-only mode
Fallback text changes per category
Weekly digest shows useful summary instead of Key development placeholder
Typecheck passes
Run collection pipeline and verify digest output has meaningful summaries
userStories.notes: Implemented. _fallback_analysis now sets why_it_matters per category + region. DB schema updated with why_it_matters column. Weekly digest fallback also updated.

userStories.title: Update frontend to use new categories
userStories.description: As a dashboard user, I want to filter and see the new categories instead of the old ones.
acceptanceCriteria: frontend/src/api.ts REGION_META updated with new category names and colors
Article filter dropdown shows new categories
Category badges on article cards use new labels
Dashboard stats show correct category breakdown
Typecheck passes
Run collection pipeline to get fresh data with new categories
Verify in browser
userStories.notes: Updated CATEGORIES in App.tsx, updated badge CSS classes in index.css. Frontend compiles successfully.

userStories.title: Format weekly digest with Telegram character limit handling
userStories.description: As a Telegram reader, I want the weekly digest formatted for mobile with proper 4096-char splitting.
acceptanceCriteria: Each market section separated by emoji separator
Links use Telegram-friendly format
TL;DR section at top shows exactly 3 cross-market stories
Total message stays under 4096 chars (truncated gracefully)
Typecheck passes
Run digest script and verify output format
userStories.notes: Added 4096-char truncation logic to _format_digest. Drops lowest-priority market sections with truncation note.

userStories.title: Add archive search endpoint with full-text search
userStories.description: As a dashboard user, I want to find any article from the last 6 months within 30 seconds using keyword search.
acceptanceCriteria: Add GET /api/articles/search endpoint with full-text search
Search returns results within 2 seconds
Supports search by keyword, region, category, date range, and min relevance score
Results sorted by relevance score descending
Frontend search bar wired to new endpoint
Typecheck passes
Test search endpoint locally with sample queries
userStories.notes: Added search_articles() in db.py, /api/articles/search endpoint in main.py, search bar in frontend.

userStories.title: Deploy all changes to Render
userStories.description: As a user, I want all changes deployed to Render so the production service is up to date.
acceptanceCriteria: Export current DB to seed_data.json for auto-seed on deploy
Commit and push all backend + frontend changes to main branch
Trigger Render deploy
Verify /api/health returns OK
Verify /api/stats shows correct category breakdown
userStories.notes: All changes deployed to Render. DB seed exported. Backend + frontend pushed.

userStories.title: Fix frontend category filter buttons + wire graph toggle checkboxes
userStories.description: As a dashboard user, I want category filter buttons to use actual backend categories and graph toggles to actually work.
acceptanceCriteria: ArticlesPage category filters use dynamic CATEGORIES map instead of hardcoded old 'service'/'trend'/'policy' values
Graph 'Cats' checkbox actually filters category nodes from the graph
Graph 'Links' checkbox actually filters article↔article backlinks from the graph
Typecheck passes
Frontend builds without errors
userStories.notes: Fixed ArticlesPage category filter buttons to render dynamically from CATEGORIES map. Wired up graph page toggle checkboxes with onChange handlers + useMemo filtering logic.
